title: Monstrous Slimes
description: tries to make slimes a bit more logical
body:
***This mod gives slimes the ability to fuse together and get bigger and more dangerous.***
It should work with any mods that doesn't change, or replace the size mechanic of slimes, or the slimes themselves.
So it doesn't work for custom modded slimes for now, it could also have some problems with mods like "SlimyBoyos" or other mods that add more data to slimes because the data will get lost on fuse.

---

some features can also be changed in the config

---

*this mod is made using mcreator*

---

[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/monstrous-slimes)

---
